summary: Validated the new 'Share this Look' feature on Caramel Popcorn (no-backend, URL-hash encoded). All 7 acceptance criteria pass: share button on each look card opens the share modal, share URL is correctly formed (910 chars, starts with https://caramel-pop.preview.emergentagent.com/share/look#data=), Copy/WhatsApp/Twitter/Email chips render with correct hrefs, modal closes via X, /share/look#data=... renders the read-only SharedLookPage with title, aesthetic + occasion chips, 3 palette swatches, 5 decoded items, Save and Browse CTAs. Clicking shared-save-btn flips its label to 'Saved to your looks ✓'. Invalid /share/look (no hash) renders shared-look-invalid + working shared-look-home CTA. Hero shared-install-btn href ends with /caramel-popcorn-extension.zip and shared-open-app navigates to '/'. Zero console errors.

tests_executed.looks_page_share_buttons: PASS - 3 look cards each render look-share-btn-<id> (look-share-btn-l1/l2/l3).
tests_executed.share_modal_opens: PASS - clicking first share button opens share-modal with share-url-input, share-copy-btn, share-whatsapp, share-twitter, share-email all present.
tests_executed.share_url_format: PASS - URL length=910 (>200), starts with 'https://caramel-pop.preview.emergentagent.com/share/look#data=' (URL-safe base64).
tests_executed.copy_button: PASS - clicking share-copy-btn changes label to 'Copied' (clipboard write succeeded with granted permissions).
tests_executed.quick_share_chips: PASS - WhatsApp href=https://wa.me/?text=..., Twitter href=https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?..., Email href=mailto:?... all correctly encoded.
tests_executed.share_modal_close: PASS - clicking share-modal-close hides share-modal (modal element removed from DOM).
tests_executed.shared_look_page_render: PASS - navigating to share URL renders shared-look-page; shared-title='Soft Old Money Brunch'; shared-aesthetic='Old Money', shared-occasion='Brunch'; shared-palette with 3 swatches; 5 shared-item-<idx> rows (Top/Bottom/Footwear/Bag/Accessory); shared-save-btn and shared-browse-btn visible.
tests_executed.shared_save_btn: PASS - clicking shared-save-btn does not throw and label flips from 'Save to my looks' to 'Saved to your looks ✓'.
tests_executed.invalid_share_url: PASS - /share/look (no hash) renders shared-look-invalid with shared-look-home CTA href='/'.
tests_executed.hero_topbar_ctas: PASS - shared-install-btn href='/caramel-popcorn-extension.zip' (ends with expected path), shared-open-app href='/'.
tests_executed.console_errors: PASS - 0 console errors during the entire share flow.

critical_code_review_comments: Solid implementation. Data-testid coverage is complete and matches the spec exactly.

share.js uses btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(...))) which is the classic UTF-8 hack — works but the modern equivalent (TextEncoder + base64) would silence deprecation warnings in stricter linters. Not blocking.

SharedLookPage saves into the same store via addItem on the public route — note that anyone who visits the share link and presses 'Save to my looks' will persist into THEIR local store (expected, but worth a tooltip).
seed_data_creation: Used the auto-seeded look 'Soft Old Money Brunch' (id=l1) from localStorage as the share source. Clicking shared-save-btn appended one read-only-derived item to the test browser's localStorage; non-destructive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Share feature is fully working at https://caramel-pop.preview.emergentagent.com. To re-test: go to /looks → click [data-testid='look-share-btn-l1'] → read [data-testid='share-url-input'] → page.goto(value) → assert [data-testid='shared-look-page']. For invalid state: page.goto('/share/look') → expect [data-testid='shared-look-invalid'].
